atDirectives.name: @tailwind
atDirectives.description: Injects Tailwind's base, components, or utilities styles.

atDirectives.name: @apply
atDirectives.description: Inlines existing utility classes into a custom CSS rule.

atDirectives.name: @layer
atDirectives.description: Places custom styles into Tailwind's base, components, or utilities layer.

atDirectives.name: @config
atDirectives.description: Specifies a Tailwind config file for the current stylesheet.

atDirectives.name: @screen
atDirectives.description: Wraps styles in a Tailwind breakpoint media query.
